creator: freebsd@funzi.org
text:
Created attachment 235332
update loki to 2.6.0, add logcli, loki-canary, and promtail

Update Loki to 2.6.0.
While being add it, also add logcli, loki-canary and promtail.
That's now parity with what loki releases on their GitHub releases page.

This obsoletes #256031 and fixes #265231

Best,
Christopher
